description: Progress bar with value/max tracking, size and color variants, striped/animated modes, indeterminate loading animation, multi-segment support, and an optional percentage label.

examples.title: Multi-segment bar
examples.code:
<TmProgressBar Segments="@(new List<ProgressSegment>
{
    new() { Value = 30, Color = "#22c55e", Label = "Done" },
    new() { Value = 20, Color = "#f59e0b", Label = "In Progress" },
    new() { Value = 10, Color = "#ef4444", Label = "Blocked" }
})" />
